headline: Is It Time To Reassess Consolidated Edison (ED) After Its Recent Share Price Performance?
summary: Wondering whether Consolidated Edison at US$108.54 is offering fair value or asking too much of new investors? This article breaks down what the current price really implies. The stock has returned 3.0% over the past week, is down 0.5% over the last 30 days, and has returns of 8.6% year to date, 7.7% over 1 year, 29.8% over 3 years, and 67.3% over 5 years. This gives you a wide range of time frames to judge how the price has behaved. Recent coverage around utilities and regulated...
